prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-BLE-BAMBOOSHOWERSQUEEGEE-1PC-AMZ Product Type: SQUEEGEE Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille 1pc Bamboo and TPR Rubber Blade Shower Squeegee for Glass Doors Bathroom Cleaning Supplies Household Essentials, Multicolor Description: Tired of water spots, soap scum and unwanted streaks taking over your shower? Keep windows and glass surfaces sparkling clean with Beille’s Shower Squeegee! Featuring a nine inch smooth and flexible TPR rubber blade, it effectively removes water, ensuring a streak free finish on smooth surfaces.

The ergonomic bamboo handle offers a comfortable, natural grip for effective cleaning. Perfect for use on windows, mirrors, glass shower doors and more, this squeegee combines functionality with sustainable design, making it a household essentials item and cleaning tool for any home. The shower squeegee comes with a built in hanging loop for convenient accessibility when not in use, while also helping to keep storage areas tidy and organized.

The natural bamboo handle finish and pop of confetti-like color lend a stylish but organic and neutral design to bathroom, laundry room, garage and more; to maximize longevity, avoid submerging bamboo in water for long periods of time.

Elevate your cleaning routine with this modern and stylish cleaning tool that combines practicality with sustainability all in one tool!

CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Simply rinse off dish brush under warm water and soap of choice to keep it looking fresh; to maximize longevity, avoid submerging bamboo in water for extended periods Search Terms: Shower squeegee; home and kitchen; bathroom cleaning supplies; house warming gifts new home; new home essentials; new home gift ideas; window cleaner; window squeegee; shower glass cleaner; household essentials; cleaning tools Features: - SHOWER SQUEEGEE: Equipped with a nine inch, non scratch TPR rubber blade and sustainable bamboo handle, the squeegee ensures durable performance and a streak free finish on smooth surfaces; tackle glass shower doors, windows, mirrors and more with ease and efficiency - SUSTAINABLE BAMBOO HANDLE: Ergonomic handle and lightweight design makes for a comfortable grip when cleaning; made from sustainable bamboo, our squeegee combines effective cleaning power with sustainability, all in one cleaning tool - CONVENIENT STORAGE: Shower squeegee comes with a built in hanging loop for convenient accessibility when not in use, while also helping to keep storage areas tidy and organized - MODERN DESIGN: Natural bamboo handle and pop of confetti-like color lend a stylish but organic and neutral design to any kitchen, bathroom, laundry room and more; to maximize longevity, avoid submerging bamboo in water for long periods of time - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 9 x 9 x 2 inches; Weight: 0.16lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille Bamboo Shower Squeegee with TPR Rubber Blade

anthropic.title_differentiation: 9 Inch TPR Rubber Blade, Sustainable Bamboo Handle, Streak-Free, Hanging Loop, Glass Doors And Windows

openai.title_differentiation: 9-Inch TPR Rubber Blade, Streak-Free Glass Cleaning, Ergonomic Bamboo Handle, Hanging Loop, For Windows And Mirrors
